briefdescription.para: Initialize with a caller-provided sample buffer.

detaileddescription.para: If the window is full, the oldest sample is evicted.

briefdescription.para: Recompute cached min/max values over the signal window.

detaileddescription.para: Population variance: Σ(x - mean)² / N, returned as Q16.16. Returns 0 if fewer than 2 samples.

briefdescription.para: Get sample at index (0 = oldest, count-1 = newest).
